# STRAT.035 ? SPIN Selling (Rackham)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** negotiation_influence
**Domain:** NEGOTIATION_INFLUENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Situation, Problem, Implication, Need-payoff questions; uncover implicit needs; develop to explicit; consultative selling

## Application
Ask situation questions; identify problems; explore implications; develop need-payoff; guide buyer to solution; consultative not pitch

## Key Values
- Question sequence
- Need development
- Consultative
- Implication exploration
- Buyer-led

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, negotiation_influence

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
